title: nepeta everardii
intro: Nepeta everardii, also known as Everard's catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta everardii include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Nepeta everardii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
